entries.title: Optional Delegate viewController
entries.description: `delegate.viewController` is now optional, simplifying integrations that do not need to provide a presenting controller. No changes required if you are already setting it.

entries.title: Apple Pay Contact Fields
entries.description: The Apple Pay sheet now requests billing/shipping address, name, email, and phone based on the merchant's required fields configuration. Driven by Dashboard settings — no code changes required.

entries.title: Shipping Address Support
entries.description: Card and APM forms now support shipping address entry, including a billing/shipping toggle and field validation.

entries.title: Auto-advance
entries.description: The form now auto-advances to the next field when input is valid, reducing keystrokes during checkout. No configuration required.

entries.title: Glass Keyboard Toolbar
entries.description: Added a keyboard toolbar with a glass effect for iOS 26. The toolbar appears automatically on iOS 26 and has no effect on earlier versions.

entries.title: CVV Length for Enrolled Cards
entries.description: Fixed the CVV field character limit for enrolled cards: the field now enforces the correct length from `securityCodeLength` in the enrollment data. Previously the default 3-digit limit was always applied.

entries.title: Validate IIN Session Header
entries.description: The validate IIN endpoint now sends `customer_session` instead of `checkout_session` during enrollment. This fixes a validation error that occurred when the session type was mismatched.

entries.title: Expiration Date Single Source
entries.description: Removed redundant `@Published` `expirationMonth` and `expirationYear` properties. Expiration date now has a single canonical source, eliminating potential state inconsistencies.

entries.title: Render Flow Hang on Disabled Form
entries.description: Fixed a hang that occurred in render flow when the payment form was disabled. The SDK now correctly proceeds to the next step instead of freezing.

entries.title: Apple Pay Flow Order
entries.description: Apple Pay flow now runs before OTT creation, aligning with the expected payment sheet sequence. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Free Trial Support
entries.description: Added support for free trial subscription flows. The SDK now handles the trial period display and confirmation step automatically.

entries.title: Hide Loader Behavior
entries.description: The hide loader call now dismisses the last presented view controller instead of only the loader overlay. No API changes required.

entries.title: Country Data Endpoint Migration
entries.description: Migrated country data requests to the `checkout/country-data` endpoint with session headers. No integration changes required.

entries.title: New Localizations
entries.description: Added Hindi, Bengali, Malayalam, and Urdu localizations. Urdu includes full RTL layout support. Activated automatically based on the device's language setting.

entries.title: Dynamic CVV Max Length
entries.description: The CVV field now enforces a dynamic maximum length based on the `securityCodeLength` value returned by the API. Previously the field always used a fixed 3-digit limit.

entries.title: Card IIN Endpoint Migration
entries.description: Migrated card IIN lookups to the `card-info` endpoint with checkout session headers. Dynamic co-badged card brand selection is now supported. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Platform Identification API
entries.description: Added a public `setPlatform` method and sub-platform header to all requests. Use `setPlatform` when integrating the SDK inside a wrapper framework.

entries.title: Punto Pago Warning Banner
entries.description: Added a warning banner for the Punto Pago kiosk disclaimer. Activated automatically for eligible payment methods — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Cardholder Name Max Length
entries.description: Increased the cardholder name field maximum length from 50 to 255 characters. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Alphanumeric CNPJ Validation
entries.description: The CNPJ field now accepts alphanumeric input to support the updated Brazilian tax ID format. No integration changes required.

entries.title: API Key Region Support
entries.description: Added region parsing from the API key. The SDK now routes requests to the correct regional endpoint automatically.

entries.title: Cardholder Name Now Optional
entries.description: The cardholder name field is now optional in card forms. Forms no longer block submission when this field is empty.

entries.title: Data Race in Payment Methods List
entries.description: Resolved a data race condition in the payment methods list loading function. This fix eliminates intermittent crashes on devices running concurrent background tasks.

entries.title: Apple Pay in Render Mode
entries.description: Fixed an Apple Pay initialization issue that prevented the payment sheet from appearing in render mode. Apple Pay now initializes correctly in all integration modes.

entries.title: cardFormType Removed from Initialization
entries.description: Removed `cardFormType` from SDK initialization. Card form type must now be configured in the Dashboard Checkout Builder. Update your integration before upgrading.

migration_notes.after:
Yuno.initialize(apiKey: apiKey)
// Configure card form type in Dashboard > Checkout > Builder

entries.title: Bug Fixes and Stability
entries.description: Various bug fixes and stability improvements. No API changes required.

entries.title: Podspec Configuration Updates
entries.description: Updated podspec configuration for improved CocoaPods compatibility. No API changes required.

entries.title: Bug Fixes and Stability
entries.description: Various bug fixes and stability improvements. No API changes required.

entries.title: Updated Package Checksum
entries.description: Updated the Swift Package Manager checksum. Re-resolve your package dependencies after upgrading.

entries.title: Bug Fixes and Stability
entries.description: Various bug fixes and stability improvements. No API changes required.

entries.title: Architecture Improvements
entries.description: Internal architecture refactoring for improved maintainability. No API changes required.

entries.title: Cards Expiring This Month Allowed
entries.description: Cards expiring in the current month and year are now accepted at checkout. Previously these cards were incorrectly rejected as expired.

entries.title: Click to Pay Passkey Support
entries.description: Added Click to Pay passkey authentication support. Activated automatically for eligible transactions — no integration changes required.

entries.title: PayPal Installments
entries.description: Added support for PayPal installments payment flow. Activated automatically when PayPal installments is configured for your account.

entries.title: Dark Mode Support
entries.description: The SDK UI now adapts to the system dark mode setting. No configuration required; the SDK follows the device appearance automatically.

entries.title: Hide Debit Cards When Credit Only
entries.description: Debit cards are now hidden from the payment methods list when the merchant has enabled credit-only mode. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Click to Pay Passkey for Render Mode
entries.description: Click to Pay passkey authentication is now supported in render mode. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Traditional Chinese Date Format
entries.description: Added Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) date format for the MM/YY expiration field. Activated automatically based on the device locale.

entries.title: ACH Field Enrollment
entries.description: Added ACH bank account fields to the enrollment form. No integration changes required; the fields appear automatically when ACH enrollment is configured.

entries.title: Settings Migration v1 to v2
entries.description: SDK settings have been migrated from the v1 schema to v2. Existing settings are migrated automatically on first launch after upgrading.

entries.title: Secondary Background Color in Flexible Actions
entries.description: Flexible actions now support a secondary background color for improved UI customization. Configure via the `YunoConfig.styles` object.

entries.title: Full Payment List Styling
entries.description: Added styling support to the full payment list view. Configure appearance via the `YunoConfig.styles` object.

entries.title: Click to Pay with Passkey
entries.description: Added Click to Pay authentication with passkey support. Activated automatically for eligible transactions — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Pending Status Enrollment Notification
entries.description: The SDK now notifies the host app of pending status during enrollment when redirecting to a deeplink. Listen for the `pending` status in your enrollment callback.

entries.title: ClearSale Web Integration
entries.description: Integrated ClearSale fraud prevention via web integration. Activated automatically when ClearSale is configured for your account — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Navigation Toolbar for Keyboard
entries.description: Added a navigation toolbar that appears above the keyboard in payment and enrollment forms. The toolbar provides previous/next field navigation and a dismiss button.

entries.title: Recurring Apple Pay Support
entries.description: Added support for recurring Apple Pay subscriptions. The SDK handles the recurring payment sheet automatically when the checkout is configured for subscriptions.

entries.title: Simplified Chinese and Traditional Chinese
entries.description: Added Simplified Chinese (zh-CN) and Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) language support. Activated automatically based on the device language setting.

entries.title: iPad Screen Support
entries.description: The payment forms now adapt to iPad screen sizes with an optimized layout. No integration changes required.

entries.title: OCR Card Scanning
entries.description: Added OCR card scanning to automatically populate card number, expiry, and cardholder name fields from the device camera. The button appears automatically in the card form when the device supports it.

entries.title: ELO Card Icon
entries.description: Added the ELO brand icon to card form and payment list. Displayed automatically when an ELO card is detected.

entries.title: Coinflow Chargeback Protection
entries.description: Integrated Coinflow chargeback protection. Activated automatically for eligible transactions — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Call Settings in Enrollment
entries.description: The SDK now calls the settings service during enrollment initialization. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Credit-Only Enrollment Mode
entries.description: Added support for restricting enrollment to credit cards only. Configure via your Dashboard payment method settings.

entries.title: Deprecated startCheckout Method
entries.description: Removed the deprecated `startCheckout(with: self)` method. Use the async `startCheckout` API instead. See the migration guide for details.

entries.title: getPaymentMethodView Async Replacement
entries.description: Replaced `getPaymentMethodView` with an async version that returns the view via a completion handler. Update call sites to use the new async signature.

entries.title: startPaymentRender Replacement
entries.description: Replaced `startPaymentRender` with a new render flow method. Update call sites to use the new method name.

entries.title: startPaymentLite Replacement
entries.description: Replaced `startPaymentLite` with an updated version. Update call sites to use the new method name.

entries.title: Missing Apple Pay Values
entries.description: Added missing values in the `/payment/complete` service call for Apple Pay. This resolves payment failures that occurred for some Apple Pay transactions.

entries.title: Nuvei 3DS Support
entries.description: Integrated Nuvei 3DS challenge handling. Activated automatically for eligible Nuvei transactions — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Styling Object Update
entries.description: Updated the `YunoConfig.styles` object structure. Review the styling documentation if you customize SDK appearance.

entries.title: Banner View Payment Action
entries.description: Added banner view support within the payment action view for flexible actions. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Text Component Identifier Separation
entries.description: Separated view block identifiers into specific text components for improved customization. Review custom text configurations if your integration overrides identifier labels.

entries.title: NuPay Banner Text Weight
entries.description: NuPay banner messages are now displayed in bold for improved readability. No integration changes required.

entries.title: CVV and Expiry Field Proportions
entries.description: Adjusted the width proportions of the CVV and expiration date fields in the card form for a more balanced layout. No integration changes required.

entries.title: External Browser Redirect
entries.description: Redirects now open in the external browser when the backend flag is set, instead of always using an in-app web view. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Luhn Validation
entries.description: Added Luhn algorithm validation to the card number field. Cards with invalid Luhn checksums are now rejected before submission, reducing server-side errors.

entries.title: Bug Fixes and Stability
entries.description: Various bug fixes and stability improvements. No API changes required.

entries.title: PayPal Enrollment
entries.description: Added PayPal enrollment support. Users can now save their PayPal account during the enrollment flow.

entries.title: Color Codable Initializers Hidden
entries.description: Color `Codable` initializers are no longer part of the public API. If you were using these initializers directly, switch to the documented color configuration methods.

entries.title: Sodexo Expiration Date Validation
entries.description: Added expiration date validation specific to Sodexo brand cards. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Redirect Payment Action Support
entries.description: Added support for the redirect payment action type, enabling redirect-based APMs to operate through the flexible actions flow.

entries.title: NuPay Installments
entries.description: Added support for NuPay installments payment flow.

entries.title: Flexible Actions Migration
entries.description: Migrated legacy Alternative Payment Methods (APMs) to the flexible actions architecture. Merchants using APMs should verify their payment flows after upgrading.

entries.title: Mercado Pago 3DS
entries.description: Integrated Mercado Pago 3DS for enhanced fraud protection. Activated automatically for eligible transactions — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Socket Connection Support
entries.description: Added WebSocket connection support based on a backend feature flag. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Airwallex Anti-fraud Integration
entries.description: Integrated Airwallex anti-fraud detection. Activated automatically for eligible transactions — no integration changes required.

entries.title: 3DS Unlimit Support
entries.description: Added 3DS challenge support for Unlimit payment method. Activated automatically — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Astropay Enrollment Support
entries.description: Added support for Astropay card enrollment. Users can now save their Astropay account during the enrollment flow.

entries.title: Redirect-Type Enrollment
entries.description: Added support for redirect-type enrollment flows. The SDK now handles the redirect and returns the enrollment result to the host app.

entries.title: Loader Recursive Presentation
entries.description: Enhanced loader display with recursive view controller presentation for more reliable loading indicators in complex navigation stacks.

entries.title: Full Payment View Size Notification
entries.description: Added a notification for the full payment view size. Use this to adjust your container layout when the SDK view changes height.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Checkout Pro Browser
entries.description: Mercado Pago Checkout Pro now opens in an in-app browser instead of a web view. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Preselected Payment Methods
entries.description: Added support for preselecting a payment method programmatically. Pass the payment method token when starting checkout to skip the payment list.

entries.title: Full Payment List Migrated to SwiftUI
entries.description: The full payment list UI has been migrated to SwiftUI for improved performance and customization. No API changes required.

entries.title: Flexible Actions Styling and QR Button
entries.description: Added styling support and a QR button to flexible actions. Configure via `YunoConfig.styles`.

entries.title: 3DS Loading URL Support
entries.description: Added support for loading external URLs during 3DS challenges. No integration changes required.

entries.title: cancelByUser Notification for Enrollment
entries.description: The SDK now sends a `cancelByUser` notification when the user closes enrollment forms. Handle this event in your enrollment callback to update your UI accordingly.

entries.title: cancelByUser Notification for Apple Pay
entries.description: The SDK now sends a `cancelByUser` notification when the user closes the Apple Pay modal. Handle this event in your payment callback to update your UI accordingly.

entries.title: Generic Enrollment Forms and WebSocket
entries.description: Added support for generic enrollment forms and WebSocket connectivity. Tested with Bancolombia button integration.

entries.title: Embedded Web View Publisher
entries.description: Fixed an issue where embedded web views did not return `anyPublisher` directly. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Nationality Removed from Required Fields
entries.description: Nationality has been removed from the required fields list. Forms no longer request this field during enrollment.

entries.title: OTP View in Flexible Actions
entries.description: Added an OTP (one-time password) input view within the flexible actions flow. Activated automatically for payment methods requiring OTP verification.

entries.title: x-sdk-type Request Header
entries.description: Added `x-sdk-type` to all outbound request headers for improved platform telemetry. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Enrolled Card Support in Dynamic SDK
entries.description: Added enrolled card handling to the dynamic SDK. Enrolled cards can now be used in dynamic payment flows.

entries.title: Authorized Substatus Notification
entries.description: Added notification for the authorized payment substatus. Handle this event to take action when a payment is authorized but not yet captured.

entries.title: Enrollment Cancellables Memory Leak
entries.description: Added `anyCancellables` to `YunoEnrollmentHeadlessImpl` to prevent memory leaks in long-running enrollment sessions.

entries.title: Koin Dependency Removed
entries.description: Removed the Koin dependency from the SDK package. This reduces binary size and eliminates potential conflicts with apps that include Koin independently.

entries.title: Xendit Indoramart Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Xendit - Indoramart payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: MetricKit Performance Monitoring
entries.description: Integrated MetricKit and `URLSessionTaskMetrics` for performance monitoring and diagnostics. Metrics are collected automatically — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Combined Payment and Enrollment Flow
entries.description: Added support for a combined payment and enrollment flow. Users can enroll a payment method and complete a payment in a single session.

entries.title: Dynamic Actions Image Support
entries.description: Added IMAGE action type support to the dynamic actions framework. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Koin SDK Integration
entries.description: Integrated the Koin SDK package for Koin PIX Parcelado support. Add the Koin dependency to your project if you plan to use Koin payment methods.

entries.title: Koin PIX Parcelado
entries.description: Added Koin PIX Parcelado installment payment support including socket-based status updates, OTP handling, and in-review status display.

entries.title: Click to Pay Token Storage
entries.description: Added saving and sending of Click to Pay (C2P) tokens in user defaults. C2P is activated via a feature flag — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Delayed Provider Response Screen
entries.description: Added a delayed provider response screen for payment methods that take additional time to confirm. No integration changes required.

entries.title: NuPay Redirect Payment
entries.description: Added NuPay redirect payment flow support. The SDK now handles the redirect and returns the payment result to the host app.

entries.title: Socket on Authorized Substatus
entries.description: The SDK now opens a socket connection when the payment substatus is `authorized`, enabling real-time status updates for authorized-but-pending payments.

entries.title: Document Required Field in Enrollment
entries.description: Added document number as a required field in enrollment forms when specified by the payment method configuration. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Inswitch Cash Payment
entries.description: Added support for Inswitch cash payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Inswitch Bank Transfer
entries.description: Added support for Inswitch bank transfer payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Xendit QRIS Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Xendit QRIS payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: SDK Seamless Integration
entries.description: Added SDK seamless integration mode for a frictionless checkout experience. Contact your Yuno technical account manager to enable this feature.

entries.title: RUT Validation and Masks
entries.description: Added Chilean RUT validation and input mask to document fields. Activated automatically for CLP transactions.

entries.title: Dynamic SDK Cleanup
entries.description: Removed `OptionalStateValue` and `YunoDynamicConnection` class from the dynamic SDK. Internal refactoring — no API changes required.

entries.title: Copy Voucher in Enrollment Flow
entries.description: Added a copy button for voucher codes in the enrollment flow. Users can now copy the voucher code directly from the enrollment screen.

entries.title: Dynamic SDK Conditional Dependencies
entries.description: Added dependencies for dynamic SDK condition evaluation. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Dynamic SDK Text Field Restrictions
entries.description: Restricted allowed characters in dynamic SDK text fields for CARD and APM types to improve input validation. No integration changes required.

entries.title: FAC 3DS Action
entries.description: Added FAC 3DS action support. Activated automatically for eligible FAC transactions — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Enrolled Card Form in Dynamic SDK
entries.description: Added enrolled card form support to the dynamic SDK. Enrolled cards can now be managed through dynamic SDK flows.

entries.title: Step-by-Step Card Form in Dynamic SDK
entries.description: Implemented step-by-step card form in the dynamic SDK. The multi-step card entry flow is now available in dynamic integrations.

entries.title: Backend-Driven Icons and View Names
entries.description: Icons and view names in the dynamic SDK are now fetched from the backend. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Step-by-Step Dynamic SDK
entries.description: Implemented step-by-step card form functionality in the dynamic SDK. The multi-step flow guides users through card entry one field at a time.

entries.title: RUT Validation
entries.description: Added Chilean RUT document validation. Validation is applied automatically to RUT fields in payment and enrollment forms.

entries.title: Dynamic SDK Analytics
entries.description: Added analytics event tracking for dynamic SDK flows. Events are sent automatically — no integration changes required.

entries.title: Accessibility Identifiers for Automation
entries.description: Added accessibility identifiers to the sample app for UI automation testing. No production integration changes required.

entries.title: Loader and Service Timeout
entries.description: Added loader display during service calls and configurable service timeout. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Analytics Event Flow
entries.description: Improved the analytics event flow for more accurate and complete event reporting. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Background Payment Status Query
entries.description: Added automatic payment status query when the app returns from background. This ensures the SDK has the latest payment state after the user completes a redirect flow.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Checkout Pro Caching
entries.description: Resolved a caching issue in Mercado Pago Checkout Pro that caused stale payment sessions to be reused. The SDK now always fetches a fresh session.

entries.title: Daviplata Document Type Filtering
entries.description: Implemented document type filtering in the Daviplata enrollment form. Only supported document types are shown, reducing user errors.

entries.title: Loader Persistence Support
entries.description: Added support for persisting the loader between navigation steps. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Terms and Conditions Opening Bug
entries.description: Fixed a bug that prevented the terms and conditions link from opening correctly. The link now opens in the in-app browser as expected.

entries.title: CheckboxColor in Yuno Appearance
entries.description: Added a `checkboxColor` field to the `Yuno.Appearance` object. Use this to customize the checkbox color in forms.

entries.title: Payment Method Form Improvements
entries.description: Improved the payment method form layout and usability. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Form Improvements
entries.description: Multiple improvements to the card form UI and validation. No API changes required.

entries.title: Required Fields in Card Form
entries.description: Added required field enforcement to the card form. Fields marked as required by the payment method configuration now block form submission when empty.

entries.title: Openpay Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Openpay payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: One-Step Card Form Customization
entries.description: Added customization options for the one-step card form. Configure appearance via the `Yuno.Appearance` object.

entries.title: New Payment Method Types
entries.description: Added support for additional payment method types. New methods are activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: PagSeguro Checkout Support
entries.description: Added support for PagSeguro checkout payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: UNLIMINT Checkout Support
entries.description: Added support for UNLIMINT checkout payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Multistep Card Form Improvements
entries.description: Multiple improvements to the multistep card form flow and validation. No API changes required.

entries.title: Yuno Appearance Initialization Bug
entries.description: Fixed a bug where `Yuno.Appearance` object initialization could fail under certain configurations. The object now initializes correctly in all cases.

entries.title: Dlocal Redirect Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Dlocal redirect payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Khipu Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Khipu payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Dlocal PSE Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Dlocal PSE payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Multiple Step Card Form Improvements
entries.description: Multiple improvements to the multiple-step card form validation and navigation. No API changes required.

entries.title: Multiple Step Card Form Improvements
entries.description: Multiple improvements to the multiple-step card entry flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: Tarjeta Clave Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Tarjeta Clave payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Kushki Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Kushki payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: Daviplata UX Improvements
entries.description: Improved the Daviplata payment form user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Diners Card Form Improvements
entries.description: Improved the Diners card entry experience in the card form. No API changes required.

entries.title: Multi-Step Card Form Option
entries.description: Added multi-step card form as an alternative to the single-step form. Configure via `cardFormType` in SDK initialization.

entries.title: Swift Package Manager Support
entries.description: Added Swift Package Manager distribution. You can now integrate the SDK using either Swift Package Manager or CocoaPods.

entries.title: Card Form General Improvements
entries.description: General improvements to the card form including layout, validation, and accessibility. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Form Wording Improvements
entries.description: Updated card form field labels and error messages for clarity. No API changes required.

entries.title: PIX and NuPay Async Payments
entries.description: Added async payment support for PIX and NuPay. The SDK now polls for status and notifies the host app when the payment completes.

entries.title: Card Enrollment Support
entries.description: Added card enrollment to allow users to save cards for future payments.

entries.title: Wibond Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Wibond payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.

entries.title: MercadoPago Wallet Support
entries.description: Added support for MercadoPago Wallet payment method. Activated automatically when configured for your account.
